title: Smoky Light Thai Vermicelli Stir-fry
description: A light and smoky solo dinner dish featuring gluten-free vermicelli pasta cooked with a mix of aromatic vegetables and spices in a creamy sauce.
instructions: Rinse the vermicelli pasta and soak it in hot water for about 5 minutes. Drain well.
Heat a tablespoon of sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add chopped shallots and garlic; stir-fry until fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
Add bell peppers to the wok and cook for another 4-5 minutes until slightly softened. Stir in vermicelli pasta and mix well with vegetables.
Pour in vegetable broth, coconut milk, fish sauce, sugar, and a pinch of salt. Bring to a simmer and let it cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Stir in Thai basil leaves and simmer briefly until the sauce thickens slightly, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.
Serve hot over steamed rice or as is with some fresh herbs on top.
